arts.ttl: Jack Draper through to Qatar Open semi-finals after beating Matteo Berrettini as Carlos Alcaraz is knocked out
arts.sum: Jack Draper is through to the semi-finals of the Qatar Open after a comeback 4-6 6-4 6-3 victory against Italy's Matteo Berrettini, on the same day top seed Carlos Alcaraz was knocked out. Berrettini, who defeated Novak Djokovic earlier in the tournament, confidently claimed the opening set against Draper in Doha, but failed to get the job done in the second.

arts.ttl: Midfielder admits he would have preferred Manchester United over Tottenham in Europa League draw
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar captain Jordy Clasie has shared his delight at drawing Tottenham in the Europa League, even if he’d have prepared Manchester United. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the Ziggo Sport following the Europa League draw on Friday. arts.ttl: Journalist explains why Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style could end up benefitting Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Sociedad could benefit from Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style under Ruben Amorim when the two sides meet in the Europa League. That’s according to journalist Miguel Ángel Moyá, via El Desmarque, who believes the Spanish side have good prospects against a team who are becoming regular opponents in Europe. arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: Ruben Amorim 's dogged insistence that his style is not for changing only serves as an enormous gift to the weaker-minded of his Manchester United players.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres transfer BOMBSHELL: Chelsea rekindle interest in Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly rekindled their interest in Sporting CP centre forward Viktor Gyokeres amid their search for a new striker this summer. Ipswich Town star Liam Delap is believed to be Chelsea ’s priority target following his immense start to life in the English top flight, although the Blues are also interested in signing Gyokeres, according to GiveMeSport .
